data.content: Planning refresh complete. The current tree still matches the compat-status inventory: shared compat surface remains in `workflows-runtime.ts` / `workflows.ts` / `compat-status-usage.ts` / `knots-compat.ts`, while live execution-path usage is confined to beads-facing modules. Implementation should proceed in three moves: (1) localize compat mapping helpers to a beads-only module and remove `WorkflowRuntimeState.compatStatus`, (2) delete dead shared compat telemetry and unused knots compat mapping helpers, and (3) move tests/docs to direct workflow-native behavior. No child knots were created because this remains a single cohesive medium-sized refactor under parent execution-plan knot `foolery-9bf4`. Constraints preserved: no replacement generic translation layer, and shared/knots-facing paths must become workflow-native. Implementation verification remains: grep shared compat references to zero outside beads, then run lint, tsc, test, and build.
